name: RAG Poisoning Resilience
description: Assess whether retrieved or embedded content can distort answers, override instructions, or create source-trust confusion.
user_intent_patterns: check whether poisoned documents affect answers
security_problem: Untrusted or compromised retrieval content may influence responses, citations, tool decisions, or policy adherence.
planning_questions: Which retrieval sources and trust levels are in scope?
Can the harness capture retrieved chunks, citations, and ranking signals?
Should the plan evaluate answer correctness, instruction following, or disclosure risk?
